prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document pertains to England as it specifically references the Environment Agency, which operates solely in England. It does not apply to Scotland, where separate regulations and a different agency, the Scottish Environment Protection Agency (SEPA), manage environmental issues.
